items.docs: Retrieves all Launch projects accessible to the authenticated user or organization. Returns project metadata including names, creation dates, and environment counts.
Creates a new Launch project for deploying a web application. Projects serve as the top-level container for environments and deployments.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific Launch project including its configuration, current status, and linked Contentstack stack.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

items.docs: Updates the configuration of an existing Launch project such as its name, description, or framework settings.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a Launch project and all its environments and deployment history. This action is irreversible.
Generates a pre-signed URL valid for 10 minutes for uploading a project build artifact file. Use this URL to upload your build package before triggering a deployment.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

items.docs: Retrieves all deployment environments configured for a Launch project, including their domain configurations and current deployment status.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

items.docs: Creates a new deployment environment for a Launch project. Each environment can have its own domain, build configuration, and deployment settings.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

items.docs: Retrieves details for a specific deployment environment including its domain configuration, framework settings, and latest deployment status.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

items.docs: Updates the configuration of a deployment environment such as domain settings or build configuration.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a deployment environment and its deployment history. This action is irreversible.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

items.docs: Triggers a CDN cache revalidation for the specified environment, forcing the CDN to fetch fresh content on the next request. Subject to cache revalidation quota limits per organization.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

items.docs: Retrieves all deployments for a specific environment, showing deployment history with status, creation times, and build metadata.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

items.docs: Triggers a new deployment to the specified environment. Requires a previously uploaded build artifact referenced by its upload URL. The deployment process builds and publishes the application to the environment's CDN infrastructure.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

params.name: deploy_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment.

items.docs: Retrieves the full details of a specific deployment including its status, build configuration, and completion information.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

params.name: deploy_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment.

items.docs: Retrieves the build and deployment logs for a specific deployment, useful for debugging failed deployments and monitoring build progress.

params.name: project_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the Launch project.

params.name: env_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment environment.

params.name: deploy_uid
params.description: The unique identifier of the deployment.

items.docs: Retrieves server-side runtime logs for a deployed environment, useful for debugging server-side rendering issues and monitoring application runtime behavior.
Retrieves the organization's current cache revalidation quota usage, showing how many revalidation requests have been used against the organization's plan limit.
